reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:43eb444c7fc5734c88e2c00c67e2f0fc]] Ordered these to brush my kids teeth. They help simplify the process of trying with a regular tooth brush at this time. Fits on fingers well. Soft and gentle on gums snd helps get teeth clean. Im satisfied.

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

❥EASY TO USE: With an easy on/off button, effective teeth cleaning with fun characters to help ease children into creating lifelong healthy habits.
❥IPX7 WATERPROOF: IPX7 waterproof craft allow direct wash with water after brushing, easy and convenient, Easily and safely enjoy the brushing even in the shower.

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

reviews.title: great for sensitive mouths!
reviews.text: I’m on the autism spectrum and my sensory issues around my mouth are so intense that I have had a lifelong phobia of the dentist. (I still go, I just have a a very anxious time.) my only complaint is that you definitely need the travel case because this thing turns itself on in your bag super easily and sounds like a marital aid. 😳

reviews.title: Unable to Install Batteries, having to return item
reviews.text: I was so excited to get my new toothbrush in the mail today but have been trying for the last 30 minutes to get the thing opened so batteries can be installed & it is next to impossible. It has a “open to install” & close, I have turned it to “open to install” it will not open, have even tried to pry it open with a knife to no avail. Instruction booklet does not touch battery installation. If I could get the batteries in - I’d probably LOVE the toothbrush, as it seems to be well made & comes with a tongue scraper/brush & 2 toothbrush heads. Purchased for autistic grandson who has trouble brushing his teeth, hoping to make things easier for his little life but this mimi is getting extra frustrated with the little “no grip” cap that won’t open for battery installation. Now have to go through the dreaded process of processing a return. On a good note, if you’re purchasing it for someone who is severely disabled - you won’t have to worry about them popping the battery compartment open & choking on the batteries because it “ain’t happening” as we say in the south. ***Update to review. Customer service is awesome. Made 1 phone call & they’ve called me back twice & sending a new system with preinstalled batteries. The one I got, must’ve been a fluke. Now updated to a 5star. Very well made. Has a 2 minute timer on it that can be set for children or someone with intellectual disability so they brush teeth for right amount of time. Nice system & wonderul customer service.

SUSTAINABLE: The travel toothbrushes are renewable, sustainable, and made from a byproduct of wheat production. A natural toothbrush with zero BPA.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: I was interested to try these toothbrushes because I thought they might be good for camping, travel, etc. I have used a couple of them and I will definitely use the rest, but I probably won't purchase them in the future. The design seems a bit wasteful/odd, as the handle is quite thick and sturdy but rather short. It is hard for me to keep my grip as I brush because the handle is so short, and my hands are not even that big. I feel like I don't get as good of a cleaning/scrubbing because of the short handle. I think the manufacturer could make the handle a little less thick, but longer. I think it would be more effective if that were the case. Also, the taste is pretty bland and it doesn't leave a "fresh" taste (like a fresh minty taste) in my mouth. I know my teeth are probably clean, but it just doesn't feel or taste like I'm getting as good of a cleaning as I do with my regular-sized toothbrush and minty toothpaste. For a one or two day trip, they would be fine, but for anything longer, I'd want to bring a standard toothbrush.

reviews.title: Fake 5 star reviews on here!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:5dfb9184c45053dabbd9b211960ab648]] First of all, there is some fake sketchy reviews on here… there is no way that these crappie silicone toothbrushes will actually brush your teeth and get all your nasty plaque of your teeth.

Second, these aren’t put sealed packaging, there are just shoved in a box and who knows what material they’re made out of? Made in fancy China… no offense to China, I really like them, they just have a bad reputation for cheaply made products that have harmful chemicals in them.

Sorry but this is a hard NO for me and a return.

HX5130, HX5251, HX5300, HX5310, HX5350, HX5351, HX5352, HX5400, HX5451, HX5500, HX5551 HX5581, HX5610, HX5611,HX5751, HX5752, HX5754, HX5810, HX5853,HX5910

features: Screw-On Handles Compatibility & Easy Installation – MERUYOO brush heads are specifically designed to fit seamlessly with your Screw-On Philip Sonicare E-series toothbrush handles, including Essence, Xtreme, Elite, Advance, and CleanCare.

High Quality & Effective Clean – MERUYOO toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonicare are made with end-rounded Dupont Nylon Bristles to ensure a thorough and effective clean. The soft, rounded bristles gently clean and polish your teeth and gums, while the advanced design allows for better reach and coverage of hard-to-reach areas.

Gentle Bristles & Gum Health – MERUYOO toothbrush heads for Philips Sonicare with special contoured soft bristles fit the shape of your teeth and gums, can help to effectively remove plaque and promote overall oral health. Soft bristles are beneficial for those with sensitive gums, as they can help to clean teeth and gums gently without causing irritation or discomfort.

Indicator Bristles – MERUYOO electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips sonicare will fade after 3 months of use when a replacement is needed. Blue soft indicator bristles will fade when it's time to replace.

Individually Wrapped & Travel – Each electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonic-care is separately packed in a bag and equipped with clear hygienic cover protecting bristles against dust and bacteria for easy storage and travel.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

title: Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrush for Kids, Kids Toothbrushes, Toothbrush Pack, Soft Bristle Toothbrushes for Kids, Toddler Toothbrush Ages 2-4, 6PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 6 multi-colored Hot Wheels kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Hot Wheels Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique car designs, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: good purchase
reviews.text: good purchase but if you have a toddler who likes to chew on the bristles then you’ll realize the bristles can come out.. so just watch out

reviews.title: Good cheap toddler toothbrushes.
reviews.text: My toddler destroys and flattens bristles. These are cheap enough that It doesn’t break the bank when she needs a new one every few weeks. Bristles also don’t fall out. Will order again.

reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4
description: Super Hard Bristles,More Cleaning Bamboo toothbrush,eco-friendly Large brush head

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

reviews.text: I like them. They aren't soft, which I like, but they also aren't hard. The tongue cleaner is useless, so you should buy a tongue cleaner.

reviews.title: Great toothbrushes!
reviews.text: I buy these in a multipack because I'm bad at replacing my toothbrushes if I have to buy them every time. Great toothbrushes. Bristles are medium firm and the circular silicon parts are very good for giving you a clean feeling. The back of head of the toothbrush is textured to use against your tongue, even though I usually don't use it that way.

reviews.title: Great Product at a Great Price
reviews.text: I have always felt that this is the greatest toothbrush ever made, and they have unfortunately become very difficult to find at my local stores.  I have never seen these value packs at any store.  This is the only way to go.  These brushes have wide, soft heads.  The handle is very ergonomically designed and fits very nicely in your hand.  Just buy them.  You won't regret it.

reviews.title: Bad design.
reviews.text:
The tongue clean is extremely irritating when you brush your teeth. Tried to peel it off and couldn't. Threw it away.
Tongue cleaning should be done with another device.

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

reviews.title: Great for classroom pencil holders!!
reviews.text: I just got these, after failed attempts with dollar store pencil holders. These are sturdy, and  can hold a marker, Expo, and 2 pencils!! I will update if they break, but they seem very sturdy!! I would recommend them to all my teaching friends. If they can stand up to second graders, they will stand up to anyone needing these for travel!

reviews.title: I bought these for my double point knitting needlseT
reviews.text:
These are as promised, they come individually wrapped and are clean and free of manufacturing grease.
I am not using them for the intended purpose but they are great for storing my sets of dp needles. I can find the size I want immediately and they don't spread themselves all over the drawer where they're kept any longer.
They seem to stay together very well, I can recommend them for this purpose with no reserve.

reviews.text: I am using these as pencil holders for my students. They are working great so far!
